parameters.subject: ={{ $json.mail_subject }}
parameters.message: ={{ (() => { let u = String($execution.resumeUrl || '').trim(); const b = String($json.config?.n8n_public_url || $json._debug_public_base || '').replace(/\/+$/, ''); if (b && /localhost|127\.0\.0\.1/i.test(u)) u = u.replace(/^https?:\/\/[^/]+/i, b); if (!u) throw new Error('resumeUrl empty — MAIL must wire directly to WAIT'); return $json.mail_body_html.split($json.resume_url).join(encodeURIComponent(u)); })() }}

meta.description: Assessment Q1–Q5 with Vertex. Candidate mails = one Gmail thread (reply). Interviewer mails = separate thread. Import, set credentials, activate.
